title: Unity
description: Unity is a cross-platform game engine developed by Unity Technologies, used to create video games and simulations for computers, consoles, and mobile devices.
longDescription: Unity is a cross-platform game engine developed by Unity Technologies, used to create video games and simulations for computers, consoles, and mobile devices. It provides a comprehensive set of tools and features for game development, including a visual editor, scripting capabilities, physics engine, and support for 2D and 3D graphics. Unity is widely used in the gaming industry due to its versatility, ease of use, and strong community support.

title: EcoRift
description: The EcoRift presents a virtual reality experience of being in national parks and preserves of the American Southwest.
longDescription: The EcoRift presents a virtual reality experience of being in national parks and preserves of the American Southwest. EcoRift links together full 360-degree spherical visual and acoustic recordings, using the Oculus head tracking feature to synchronize an auditory and visual Point of View (POV) so the user can look around the environment as if truly present in it.  EcoRift can be used in exhibitions in park communities, at festivals and galleries and in other venues internationally. In the future individuals will be allowed to capture their own audio-visual experience in National Parks and upload it for sharing.  Along with the development of other rich media tools, EcoRift directs communities to issues of sustainability and environmental engagement. It raises questions of how digital technology and rich media environments can be used to reassess our value systems and develop a better understanding of the parks’ precious, yet fragile ecosystems. Given the ongoing need to increase ecological consciousness, the EcoRift is designed to provide new virtual immersive experiences to cultivate environmental stewardship and community agency.

title: Portfolio Site
description: This website was built with Blazor WASM.
longDescription: This website was built with Blazor WebAssembly. The site features a clean and modern design, with a focus on showcasing my projects and skills. The site is fully responsive, ensuring that it looks great on all devices.

title: Survival VR
description: SurvivalVR is a wave-based VR survival shooter for the HTC Vive and Oculus Rift developed using Unreal Engine 4.
longDescription: SurvivalVR is a wave-based VR survival shooter for the HTC Vive and Oculus Rift developed using Unreal Engine 4. The game features a variety of weapons and enemies, as well as a unique wave-based gameplay mechanic that keeps players on their toes. Players must use their wits and reflexes to survive against increasingly difficult waves of enemies, all while navigating the immersive VR environment.

title: Survival VR 2.0 : Robots Revenge
description: Survival VR 2 is a VR Action game for the HTC Vive and Oculus Rift developed using Unreal Engine 4.
longDescription: Survival VR 2 is a VR Action game for the HTC Vive and Oculus Rift developed using Unreal Engine 4. Escape from the lab and fight your way through waves of robots to survive. The game features a variety of weapons and enemies, as well as a thrilling storyline. Players must use their wits and reflexes to survive against increasingly difficult waves of enemies, all while navigating the immersive VR environment.

title: Concert VR
description: Concert VR is a virtual reality application that allows users to experience a live recorded concert experience.
longDescription: Concert VR is a virtual reality application that allows users to experience a live recorded concert experience. Users' head movements and gaze were then tracked in order to gather data for a research project. The application was developed using Unity and C#, featuring ambisonic audio and high quality 360 recordings, designed to be used with the Oculus Quest VR headset.

title: Tell Me Why
description: An episodic narrative adventure following twins Tyler and Alyson as they investigate the mysterious death of their mother in rural Alaska.
longDescription: Tell Me Why is a three-chapter episodic adventure game developed by DON'T NOD and published by Xbox Game Studios. Players alternate between twin protagonists Tyler and Alyson, using their shared telepathic ability to relive memories and unravel the truth behind their mother's death. Noted as the first major-studio game to feature a playable transgender lead character.

title: Age of Empires: Definitive Edition
description: A fully remastered version of the 1997 classic real-time strategy game, featuring 4K visuals, a remastered soundtrack, and the Rise of Rome expansion.
longDescription: Age of Empires: Definitive Edition is a complete remake of the original 1997 Age of Empires, rebuilt with 4K Ultra HD graphics, improved pathfinding, a fully remastered soundtrack, and all content from the Rise of Rome expansion. Developed by Forgotten Empires and Tantalus Media, and published by Xbox Game Studios.

title: Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition
description: A landmark remaster of the beloved 1999 RTS, bringing 4K graphics, remastered audio, improved AI, and all major expansions to modern platforms.
longDescription: Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition celebrates the 20th anniversary of the franchise with a fully rebuilt visual engine supporting 4K resolution, remastered soundtrack, and all previous DLC including The Last Khans. Developed by World's Edge, Forgotten Empires, CaptureAge, and Tantalus Media, published by Xbox Game Studios.

title: Age of Empires III: Definitive Edition
description: A comprehensive remaster of Age of Empires III featuring improved visuals, new content, rebalanced gameplay, and two new civilizations.
longDescription: Age of Empires III: Definitive Edition is a full remaster of the 2005 original, offering 4K Ultra HD graphics, a fully remastered soundtrack, and all previously released DLC. It introduces two new civilizations — the Inca and Sweden — along with significant gameplay rebalancing. Developed by Tantalus Media and Forgotten Empires, published by Xbox Game Studios.

title: VR Environments
description: VR Environments is an experimental system combining Oculus VR with accurate spatial tracking using an Optitrack Mocap System.
longDescription: VR Environments is an experimental system combining Oculus VR with accurate spatial tracking using an Optitrack Mocap System. The system also utilizes a Leap Motion controller to encourage interaction and immersion.
